overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a rocky dirt trail through grassland at night, approaching a distant illuminated area with trees. The footage appears to be from a survival video game with atmospheric low-light conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky rural trail through grassland at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky path toward the distant warm light visible on the left horizon

entered.detail: uneven dirt trail with scattered rocks illuminated by a forward light source
tall grass lining the left side of the trail
tall grass lining the right side of the trail
dark tree line silhouetted against the night sky on the horizon
small warm orange glow from a campfire or building visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rocky dirt trail at night. Tall grass lines both sides of the path while a distant warm light glows on the left horizon beyond a silhouetted tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching tree line and distant light source

events.description: large tree silhouette emerges from darkness on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the trail as the distant light and trees become more defined

entered.detail: prominent dark tree shape becoming visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the night trail, the camera approaches closer to the distant tree line. The warm light on the left becomes more prominent, and a large tree silhouette emerges on the right side of the path as the forest ahead grows clearer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark, rocky trail that gradually draws closer to a mysterious source of light. It begins with a walk through tall grass under a night sky, where a faint, warm glow flickers on the distant left horizon beyond a silhouetted tree line. As the camera advances along the dirt path, the distant light becomes more prominent and piercing against the darkness. The scene then shifts as the forest ahead grows clearer, with a large, imposing tree silhouette emerging on the right side of the trail before the camera closes the gap toward the illuminated woodland.
